'''âp-zh-r''' ('''kapazhar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:caliper|caliper]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:caliper|caliper]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kapazhar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipazhar|thipazhar]] || [[word:jipazhar|jipazhar]] || [[word:shipazhar|shipazhar]] || [[word:kipazhar|kipazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupazhar|thuthupazhar]] || [[word:jujupazhar|jujupazhar]] || [[word:shushupazhar|shushupazhar]] || [[word:kukupazhar|kukupazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupazhar|thupazhar]] || [[word:jupazhar|jupazhar]] || [[word:shupazhar|shupazhar]] || [[word:kupazhar|kupazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupazhar|thupazhar]] || [[word:jupazhar|jupazhar]] || [[word:shupazhar|shupazhar]] || [[word:kupazhar|kupazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepazhar|thepazhar]] || [[word:jepazhar|jepazhar]] || [[word:shepazhar|shepazhar]] || [[word:kepazhar|kepazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopazhar|thothopazhar]] || [[word:jojopazhar|jojopazhar]] || [[word:shoshopazhar|shoshopazhar]] || [[word:kokopazhar|kokopazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopazhar|thopazhar]] || [[word:jopazhar|jopazhar]] || [[word:shopazhar|shopazhar]] || [[word:kopazhar|kopazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopazhar|thopazhar]] || [[word:jopazhar|jopazhar]] || [[word:shopazhar|shopazhar]] || [[word:kopazhar|kopazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpazhar|thĂŠpazhar]] || [[word:jĂŠpazhar|jĂŠpazhar]] || [[word:shĂŠpazhar|shĂŠpazhar]] || [[word:kĂŠpazhar|kĂŠpazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapazhar|thathapazhar]] || [[word:jajapazhar|jajapazhar]] || [[word:shashapazhar|shashapazhar]] || [[word:kakapazhar|kakapazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapazhar|thapazhar]] || [[word:japazhar|japazhar]] || [[word:shapazhar|shapazhar]] || [[word:kapazhar|kapazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapazhar|thapazhar]] || [[word:japazhar|japazhar]] || [[word:shapazhar|shapazhar]] || [[word:kapazhar|kapazhar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shapazhar|shapazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshapazhar|goshapazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishapazhar|gokishapazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shapazharnĂŒ|shapazharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshapazharnknĂŒ|goshapazharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazharnĂŒ|gokishapazharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shapazharshĂ«|shapazharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshapazharnkshĂ«|goshapazharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishapazharshĂ«|gokishapazharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazharo|shapazharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazharnkro|goshapazharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazharo|gokishapazharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazharmu|shapazharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazharnkmu|goshapazharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazharmu|gokishapazharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shapazharsher|shapazharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshapazharnksher|goshapazharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishapazharsher|gokishapazharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shapazharng|shapazharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshapazharnkng|goshapazharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishapazharng|gokishapazharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shapazharya|shapazharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshapazharnkya|goshapazharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishapazharya|gokishapazharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shapazharyam|shapazharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshapazharnkyam|goshapazharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishapazharyam|gokishapazharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazharnĂŒshĂ«|shapazharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshapazharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishapazharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazharnĂŒro|shapazharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazharnknĂŒro|goshapazharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazharnĂŒro|gokishapazharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazharnĂŒmu|shapazharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazharnknĂŒmu|goshapazharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazharnĂŒmu|gokishapazharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazharshĂ«nĂŒ|shapazharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshapazharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishapazharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazharshĂ«ro|shapazharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazharnkshĂ«ro|goshapazharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazharshĂ«ro|gokishapazharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazharshĂ«mu|shapazharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazharnkshĂ«mu|goshapazharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazharshĂ«mu|gokishapazharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazharonĂŒ|shapazharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazharnkronĂŒ|goshapazharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazharonĂŒ|gokishapazharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazharoshĂ«|shapazharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazharnkroshĂ«|goshapazharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazharoshĂ«|gokishapazharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shapazharomu|shapazharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshapazharnkromu|goshapazharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishapazharomu|gokishapazharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shapazharmunĂŒ|shapazharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshapazharnkmunĂŒ|goshapazharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishapazharmunĂŒ|gokishapazharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shapazharmushĂ«|shapazharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshapazharnkmushĂ«|goshapazharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishapazharmushĂ«|gokishapazharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shapazharmuro|shapazharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshapazharnkmuro|goshapazharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishapazharmuro|gokishapazharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
